purpose: One of the most common Saudi content archetypes — product shown at intersection of traditional Saudi elements and hyper-modern aesthetics. Unique to Saudi Vision 2030 brand identity.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

product.description: Product to place at the traditional-modern visual intersection

prompt_template: Split-world product photography — {product} placed at exact visual intersection of traditional Saudi (sadu textile, brass dallah, geometric Islamic patterns, sand/stone textures) and ultra-modern Saudi (clean glass surfaces, neon accent lighting, futuristic architecture lines), seamless blend suggesting Vision 2030 identity, no people, 1:1 or 4:5 format {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: jarring or unresolved split (must feel seamlessly blended)
Avoid in output: generic global modernity without Saudi-specific modern references
Avoid in output: religious symbols used as mere decoration
notes: Intents: all. Saudi adaptation guidance: The traditional-meets-modern archetype is the visual language of Vision 2030 brand identity. It appears across every sector in Saudi content. Key traditional elements: sadu weaving (geometric diamond patterns in earth tones), brass dallah, geometric Islamic arabesque patterns, sandstone and date palm. Key modern elements: NEOM-style futuristic glass, KAFD/King Abdullah Financial District lighting, chrome and neon. The blend must feel intentional, not accidental. This is an evergreen chain suitable for any product launch or brand campaign. Compliance level: standard.
